jobs.title: Excel Stock Data Reconciliation
jobs.description:
I have several Excel workbooks that track our stock supply quantities. Unfortunately, the running balances have drifted and I keep running into inconsistent data. I need a data-savvy professional to dig into the spreadsheets, locate every mismatch, and return a clean, fully reconciled file.

Here is what I’m after:  
• Work directly in the existing .xlsx files—no data extraction needed.  
• Clean and standardise the key columns (item code, in-qty, out-qty, balance, unit cost, payment status).  
• Identify and flag each row, SKU, or date range where the quantity on hand does not reconcile with
skills: Data AnalysisData CleansingData EngineerData EntryData ManagementData VisualizationExcelVisual Basic

jobs.title: Website Build Assistance (Emergent AI Website Deployment)
jobs.description:
I am preparing to launch a web application through Emergent AI and want a seasoned engineer to make sure it will scale smoothly once traffic arrives. The exact cloud home—AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud—hasn’t been locked in yet, so part of the engagement is to compare the three, recommend the best fit, and then set up the environment accordingly.  

The core objective is straightforward: tune every layer of the stack for rock-solid scalability. That means analysing current code and infrastructure, spotting bottlenecks, proposing architecture tweaks, and then implementing the changes.

jobs.title: Pre-Education vetting project, Panama City, Panama
jobs.description:
We require a comprehensive background check on a job applicant based in Panama City, Panama, with a sole focus on employment verification.

A physical site visit is required at West Coast University, Panama

The purpose of the visit is to:

1. Complete the verification form

2. Photographic or documented evidence of the site visit

I will provide full support and all relevant documentation required for this process. Assistance in contacting the appropriate authorities or the institution directly, if necessary, would also be appreciated.

jobs.title: Arduino Fall Detection Prototype
jobs.description:
I need an efficient fall-detection sketch written for an Arduino Uno. The core of the job is clean, well-commented code that reads a motion sensor, recognises a fall event with reliable thresholds or algorithms, and triggers a simple alert routine (serial message or digital pin change is fine for now—I mainly want the detection logic solid).

You will handle:
• Sensor integration: wire and initialise the chosen motion sensor, then sample the data at a rate that preserves accuracy without wasting resources.  
• Fall-detection logic: implement and briefly document the calculations or heuristics
